findings.title: Notification delivery has no retry on transient failure
findings.description: The sendNotification method does not retry on transient delivery errors (e.g., network timeout). A failed delivery silently drops the notification.

findings.title: Notification worker processes unbounded in-memory queue
findings.description: The worker pulls notifications from an unbounded in-memory array. Under high load this grows without limit; a bounded queue with backpressure is needed.

findings.title: Notification recipient not validated against caller's allowed targets
findings.description: The createNotification endpoint accepts an arbitrary recipient ID without verifying the caller has permission to send to that recipient, enabling notification spam or data disclosure.

path_and_reason_header: Review path: multi-model (above-threshold diff; reviewers: 2 native, 0 external succeeded)

continuation_event.details: External reviewers codex-review-prompter (cli_missing), gemini-review-prompter (cli_missing) failed. Continuing with native-only review.
